<?php declare(strict_types=1); namespace Pest\Mutate\Mutators\String; use Pest\Mutate\Mutators\Abstract\AbstractFunctionCallUnwrapMutator; class UnwrapNl2br extends AbstractFunctionCallUnwrapMutator { public const SET = 'String'; public const DESCRIPTION = 'Unwraps `nl2br` calls.'; public const DIFF = <<<'DIFF' $a = nl2br('Hello World'); // [tl! remove] $a = 'Hello World'; // [tl! add] DIFF; public static function functionName(): string { return 'nl2br'; } }
